tags.fixme: Junction does have a no right turn restriction, but it "buses, taxis, bicycles, accessible parking" as per the sign on street view (Aug 2025). I don't have any experience with editing roadway restrictions like this, so I wanted to make those who do aware.
tags.note: Link to the street view of the sign in question: https://tinyurl.com/osmfixme

The traffic light here is poorly designed due to the intersection angle, which does allow a straightforward direction on T St. Adding a short link and alley extension to:

1. Ensure the routing works without GPS drift
2. Ensure T St->Florida Ave without G
